subject: [PATCH v3 17/28] nfsd: add notification handlers for dir events

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch adds support for directory events in the NFS daemon (nfsd). It introduces a new notification handler for dir events and creates a CB_NOTIFY request to handle these notifications. When a directory is created, it sets up a callback to handle the event and allocates an nfsd_notify_event object. If any delegation is affected by the event, it recalls them if anything fails along the way. The patch modifies several files in the fs/nfsd directory to implement this functionality.
